title: S&P 500 +1.02% to 7,209 new all-time high; Alphabet +10% on earnings
snippet: S&P 500 rose 1.02% to 7,209 — first close above 7,200. April gained 10.4%, best month since Nov 2020. Alphabet rallied ~10% on earnings beat. Microsoft -4%, Meta -9% on AI capex concerns. Caterpillar +10%. Oil $126→$111 reversal contributed to afternoon rally.
tag_reason: New all-time high, first above 7,200; April best month since Nov 2020; distinct from 4/29 -0.04%
